task_completion.description: Check if the scalar function 'dbo.fn_UtilizationRate' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL query editor showing 'CREATE FUNCTION dbo.fn_UtilizationRate' with Actual/Available logic, or the function visible in the Azure Data Studio Object Explorer under Programmability > Functions.

task_completion.description: Check if the view 'dbo.vw_WorkCenterMonthlyMetrics' was created with the required aggregations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL query editor showing 'CREATE VIEW dbo.vw_WorkCenterMonthlyMetrics' with joins on WorkOrderRouting and Location, or the view visible in the Object Explorer.

task_completion.description: Check if the table 'Production.BottleneckAnalysis' was created to store the results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL query editor showing 'CREATE TABLE Production.BottleneckAnalysis' with the required 10 columns (LocationID, LocationName, AnalysisYear, etc.), or the table visible in the Object Explorer.

task_completion.description: Check if the stored procedure 'dbo.usp_IdentifyBottlenecks' was created with the correct scoring logic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL query editor showing 'CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_IdentifyBottlenecks' containing the BottleneckScore formula ((AvgUtilizationRate * 40) + ...) and DENSE_RANK() function.

task_completion.description: Check if the stored procedure was executed specifically for the year 2013.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL query editor showing 'EXEC dbo.usp_IdentifyBottlenecks 2013' (or similar) with a successful execution message, or a SELECT query showing the populated table with 2013 data.

task_completion.description: Check if the final table contents were exported to the specified CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Azure Data Studio 'Save As CSV' dialog, a file explorer showing 'bottleneck_report_2013.csv' in '/home/ga/Documents/exports/', or a terminal showing the file exists.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used Azure Data Studio connected to AdventureWorks2022.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Azure Data Studio interface is visible with an active connection to the local SQL Server and AdventureWorks2022 database.

integrity.description: Verify the agent wrote actual SQL logic rather than hardcoding answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SQL scripts contain the required formulas (e.g., AvgUtilizationRate * 40) and aggregations (GROUP BY) rather than static INSERT statements with pre-calculated numbers.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV was exported from the query results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the 'Save as CSV' button in the Azure Data Studio results grid or a valid command-line export tool, rather than manually typing a CSV file in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path for the CSV export is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/exports/bottleneck_report_2013.csv'. The analysis year to be executed and exported is 2013.
